title: Romantic Yeasty Dutch Bananas Tart
description: A velvety, yeasty Dutch dessert featuring caramelized bananas, topped with a shiny lacquer-glaze. Perfect for a romantic evening.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, cream the softened butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs, one at a time, followed by the mashed bananas.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and yeast.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Gradually add the milk and mix until a sticky dough forms.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5-7 minutes, until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 45-60 minutes, or until doubled in size.
Punch down the dough and roll out into a large rectangle, about 1/4-inch thick.
Transfer the dough to a greased 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the tart is baking, prepare the lacquer-glaze by whisking together the ingredients.
Remove the tart from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Drizzle the lacquer-glaze over the top of the tart and serve warm.
